raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I placed a {$980.00} deposit on a motor vehicle. I t was an online auction and I used my Citibank Mastercard. The seller changed the description of the vehicle after the auction was over. I called them to cancel the sale but they would not cancel it. I filed a dispute with Citibank on XX/XX/year>. Citibank decided in favor of the merchant.
